THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, DEBORAH LEWIS, FRANK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2176 MISSION ST, ROOM 34, SFCA $1,100.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL BE ISSUED. ALSO IF DEFENDANTS VACATE SUBJECT PREMISES BY MARCH 15, 1994, PLAINTIFF SHALL WAIVE $1,100.00 BACK RENT PRINCIPLE.
